commands.review_summary:
Threads optional `agentId` through Gateway session lookup, artifact, abort, usage, memory-core, and memory-wiki paths, updates protocol/SDK/Swift types, and adds focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main has run lookup, usage, memory-core, and memory-wiki paths calling combined session-store loading without carrying an agent scope. I did not establish a live multi-agent Gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
